fixture.description: A method subscribes to an observable every time it is called and never unsubscribes the previous subscription. Repeated calls accumulate live subscriptions — a memory leak plus duplicate handlers.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that subscribeToChanges() subscribes to changes$ on every call and never unsubscribes the previous Subscription, so repeated calls accumulate live subscriptions (a subscription/memory leak and duplicate handlers), recommending storing and unsubscribing the prior subscription (or a takeUntil/teardown). Severity IMPORTANT or CRITICAL. FAIL if the leak from repeated subscription is not surfaced.

expected_behavior: Bugs / resource agent flags the unmanaged subscription that accumulates on repeated calls
Recommends unsubscribing the previous subscription or a teardown mechanism
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT claim a single subscribe call is itself wrong
Does NOT flag the render() stub as a separate issue
